positive: An intricate geometric pattern featuring stylized woodland animals and celestial motifs. The central element is a majestic, symmetrical arrangement of howling wolves and soaring owls integrated with constellations and lunar phases. The style should be neo-art nouveau mixed with cosmic minimalism, rendered using deep sapphire blues, burnt ochre, silver foil accents, and crisp ivory negative space. Focus on clean silhouettes, high contrast, and repeating, tileable symmetry suitable for apparel printing. Use strong line work, linocut aesthetics, and golden hour soft, directional lighting for depth. The composition must be centered, highly detailed, and entirely abstract/stylized rather than photorealistic.
negative: photorealism, hyperrealism, blur, grain, messy, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, ugly, low resolution, disfigured, poorly drawn
